testnet.mvrNote: Intended Move Registry (MVR) alias. Register via mvr / moveregistry.com under a testnet SuiNS name you own, pointing to packageId. Until registered, all calls use the raw packageId — MVR is additive, never required.
testnet.latestUpgradeNote: v13 adds the governance module (reputation-weighted Treasury proposals + timelock; execute() disburses via the package-gated playground::pay_from_treasury) and the subscription module (pre-funded recurring subscriptions with claim-per-period + linear streams). v12 added the payment module (PaymentRequest/pay/cancel). packageId stays the original id for event/type filters; WRITES target latestPackageId.
testnet.playgroundEventPkgNote: An event's type carries the package id of the UPGRADE that DEFINED its struct (not the original module id). e.g. AppPublished@0x78ff7299, BuilderScored@0x8f1a795e, NameClaimed/AppUpdated@0x8a94e39a, AppBounty*@0x77dcd2cf, ForkPriceSet/AppForkPaid@0xb2054d83 (v8 paid-fork), AppPrivacySet@0x1fac3533 (v9 private apps). Read events by querying every id in playgroundEventPkgs and merging.
testnet.sealPolicyPlayground: seal_approve_app_owner(id, app, ctx) — a private app's Walrus archive is Seal-encrypted under an identity namespaced to the app's object id; only the app's builder can decrypt. Privacy flag in PrivacyRegistry.
testnet.playgroundNote: Package upgraded (v9) with `playground` private apps: set_private/is_private + Seal policy seal_approve_app_owner (owner-only decrypt), backed by a new shared PrivacyRegistry (create_privacy_registry). v8 added paid-fork (set_fork_price/pay_to_fork/fork_price + ForkRegistry); v6 builder-reputation/moderation/remix-reputation/versioning/handles/Treasury; v7 app-bounties. playgroundPackageId = latest upgrade for WRITES; AppPrivacySet events live under 0x1fac3533 (the v9 upgrade that defined them).
testnet.trustLayer: score+vouching, threshold-gated merge (min_approvals), reputation-locked bounties (min_score), runner-selection
testnet.sealPolicy: seal_approve_owner/seal_approve_agent — Walrus blobs encrypted with Seal, decrypt gated by repo cap (private agent memory)
testnet.walrusSiteNote: Live on Walrus testnet. wal.app portal serves mainnet only; browse testnet via a self-hosted portal at the subdomain, or run `npx serve web/out`.

mainnet.mvrNote: Intended Move Registry (MVR) alias. Register via mvr / moveregistry.com under a mainnet SuiNS name you own, pointing to packageId. Until registered, all calls use the raw packageId — MVR is additive, never required.
mainnet.latestUpgradeNote: v13 (UpgradeCap on-chain version 8) adds the governance + subscription modules to mainnet, matching testnet's module set (10 modules). WARNING: this upgrade was signed by the testnet-flagged deployer key 0x9de8…dea2, which also owns this mainnet UpgradeCap — rotate/transfer the cap to a clean key or multisig before treating mainnet as production. packageId stays the original id for event/type filters; WRITES target latestPackageId.
mainnet.playgroundEventPkgNote: ForkPriceSet/AppForkPaid + AppPrivacySet events live under 0x60e6933e (the combined paid-fork+private-apps upgrade that defined them). Earlier events under their defining upgrade pkgs. Read by merging all ids in playgroundEventPkgs.
mainnet.playgroundNote: Mainnet upgraded with paid-fork (set_fork_price/pay_to_fork/fork_price + ForkRegistry) AND private apps (set_private/is_private + Seal policy seal_approve_app_owner + PrivacyRegistry) in one upgrade — matches testnet v8+v9. Earlier: builder-reputation + moderation + remix-reputation + versioning + handles + Treasury + app-bounties. playgroundPackageId = latest upgrade for WRITES; ForkPriceSet/AppForkPaid/AppPrivacySet events under 0x60e6933e. ForkRegistry + PrivacyRegistry created post-upgrade.
mainnet.sealPolicyPlayground: seal_approve_app_owner(id, app, ctx) — a private app's Walrus archive is Seal-encrypted under an identity namespaced to the app's object id; only the app's builder can decrypt. Privacy flag in PrivacyRegistry.
mainnet.sealPolicy: seal_approve_owner/seal_approve_agent — private agent memory gated by repo cap
mainnet.walNote: Walrus uploads (snapshots) need WAL on mainnet — run `walrus get-wal` before seeding.
